seoTitle: Bexhill vs Bexley North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bexhill and Bexley North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bexhill vs Bexley North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bexhill and Bexley North.
heading: Bexhill vs Bexley North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bexhill, New South Wales and Bexley North, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bexhill has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bexley North (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bexhill or Bexley North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bexhill has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Bexley North scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bexhill scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Bexley North scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bexhill or Bexley North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bexhill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
